name: stakeholder-sim
description: Stakeholder reaction simulation for PR and marketing. Industry-agnostic — researches the sender, maps stakeholders, and builds a persona cast per run (or loads a preset library). Spawns persona subagents in parallel, critic-passes each reaction, synthesizes consensus/disagreement/surprise signals, and verifies every quote. Fully agentic pipeline. Ships with an Aker BioMarine sample preset.
